focus: feature_catalog_code: CLI prompt ↔ agent contract catalog

findingDetails.title: CLI fan-out prompt names the deep-review agent and instructs it to run the full loop
findingDetails.claim: The generated CLI lineage prompt opens with "You are a ${agentName} agent running a fan-out lineage" and instructs it to "Run phase_init, phase_main_loop ... and phase_synthesis" (fanout-run.cjs:806, 816). For review lineages agentName resolves to "deep-review", whose contract (agents/deep-review.md:34, 54-64) states it executes EXACTLY ONE iteration, is LEAF-only, and MUST NOT run the full loop. The prompt therefore contradicts the agent contract it names.
findingDetails.recommendation: Render CLI lineage prompts as command-host/orchestrator prompts (the subprocess is the /deep:review loop owner, not the LEAF agent), or dispatch through the command surface directly, so LEAF-only agent instructions are not placed in conflict with full-loop phase execution.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Finding is within the declared spec-folder / deep-loop orchestration review scope.
